subject: Re: mtv...
body:
his assistant would be fine.. you can tell him if he
needs a reference to call me

--- Jen Doyle <jennifercdoyle@yahoo.com> wrote:

> Hi Jeffrey,
>    
>   I hope you are enjoying Paris! 
>    
>    ...per your permission, I called John Sykes's
> office on Friday evening and I spoke with his
> assistant.  I explained that I was calling from your
> office on account of your suggestion and my interest
> in moving on to pursue a career in the music
> industry.  In turn, she asked that I write her and
> Mr. Sykes, an email, which further describes myself,
> my interests and request.  
>    
>   Just checking in to make sure it's alright for me
> to proceed in writing this email...and I am also
> wondering what the extent of my request can/should
> be. May I ask to meet with Mr. Sykes and/or one of
> his staff members, to discuss my interests/possible
> opportunities at MTV?  Or is that too much to ask? 
> What did you have in mind?  
>    
>   Thanks,
> Jen
> 
> 		
> ---------------------------------
> New Yahoo! Messenger with Voice. Call regular phones
> from your PC and save big.


__________________________________________________

body_html:
his assistant would be fine.. you can tell him if he
needs a reference to call me

--- Jen Doyle jennifercdoyle@yahoo.com wrote:

Hi Jeffrey,

I hope you are enjoying Paris!

...per your permission, I called John Sykes's
office on Friday evening and I spoke with his
assistant. I explained that I was calling from your
office on account of your suggestion and my interest
in moving on to pursue a career in the music
industry. In turn, she asked that I write her and
Mr. Sykes, an email, which further describes myself,
my interests and request.

Just checking in to make sure it's alright for me
to proceed in writing this email...and I am also
wondering what the extent of my request can/should
be. May I ask to meet with Mr. Sykes and/or one of
his staff members, to discuss my interests/possible
opportunities at MTV? Or is that too much to ask?
What did you have in mind?

Thanks,
Jen

from your PC and save big.
